close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.1: Completed: added RCH worker workspace-shadow classifier and runpack failure-action coverage for stale parent-workspace cargo failures.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.2: Completed: runpack/autopilot degraded Agent Mail posture now distinguishes transport and semantic readiness and surfaces Beads active ownership evidence for soft locks.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.3: Completed validation proof replay ledger for cargo/script/UBS/Beads gates with coverage authority, fail-closed claimed-path mismatch handling, and blocker fixtures for unrelated worktree plus RCH workspace shadow.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.4: Completed read-only temp artifact inventory with explicit no-delete cleanup boundaries, stable fixtures, and runpack/runbook contract coverage.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.5: Implemented deterministic stale in-progress bead report with dirty worktree, recent commit, and degraded coordination evidence handling
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.6: Completed no-mock degraded-coordination runpack E2E with real temp Beads inputs, Agent Mail semantic failure fixture, RCH workspace-shadow blocker, degraded validation assertions, and no-delete evidence.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.7: Completed deterministic cgroup/NUMA/local-build/RCH queue swarm validation budget model with Doctor budget explanations and replay fixtures.
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.8: Completed provider/RPC/TUI backpressure budget contract with read-only aggregator, contract, and checked-in evidence
close_reasons.bd-63x3v.9.9: Completed operator explanation layer for stale evidence, missing artifacts, RCH failures, dirty worktree conflicts, and Agent Mail degradation with claim-integrity fixtures

checklist.requirement: All sixth-wave validation-hardening child Beads are closed before closeout.

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: RCH workspace-shadow detection does not mutate workers, cancel jobs, or claim pi_agent_rust failed to compile when worker checkout scope is wrong.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed: added RCH worker workspace-shadow classifier and runpack failure-action coverage for stale parent-workspace cargo failures.
child_artifact_map.title: Detect RCH remote workspace shadow failures before cargo gates

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Degraded Agent Mail posture recommends Beads soft locks but does not repair, mutate, or replace Agent Mail state.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed: runpack/autopilot degraded Agent Mail posture now distinguishes transport and semantic readiness and surfaces Beads active ownership evidence for soft locks.
child_artifact_map.title: Report Agent Mail degraded-mode Beads soft-lock posture in swarm preflight

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Validation proof replay ledger records command authority and blockers but does not make uncovered validation green.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed validation proof replay ledger for cargo/script/UBS/Beads gates with coverage authority, fail-closed claimed-path mismatch handling, and blocker fixtures for unrelated worktree plus RCH workspace shadow.
child_artifact_map.title: Build validation proof replay ledger for cargo and script gates

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Temp artifact inventory is read-only and does not authorize file or directory deletion without operator approval.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed read-only temp artifact inventory with explicit no-delete cleanup boundaries, stable fixtures, and runpack/runbook contract coverage.
child_artifact_map.title: Track swarm temp artifacts and cleanup permission boundaries

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Stale in-progress bead heuristics emit review checklists and do not auto-reopen or steal active work.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Implemented deterministic stale in-progress bead report with dirty worktree, recent commit, and degraded coordination evidence handling
child_artifact_map.title: Add stale in-progress bead heuristic report with safe reopen checklist

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Degraded-coordination E2E evidence proves handoff behavior only and does not mark validation infrastructure healthy.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed no-mock degraded-coordination runpack E2E with real temp Beads inputs, Agent Mail semantic failure fixture, RCH workspace-shadow blocker, degraded validation assertions, and no-delete evidence.
child_artifact_map.title: Add no-mock degraded-coordination swarm runpack E2E

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Swarm resource budget recommendations are advisory and do not create release-facing performance or capacity claims.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed deterministic cgroup/NUMA/local-build/RCH queue swarm validation budget model with Doctor budget explanations and replay fixtures.
child_artifact_map.title: Model cgroup and NUMA-aware swarm validation budgets
validation_commands: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/tmp cargo test swarm_resource_preflight -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/target TMPDIR=/data/tmp/pi_agent_rust_cargo/<agent>/tmp cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Provider/RPC/TUI backpressure budget contract aggregates existing evidence and does not duplicate or replace pressure tests.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed provider/RPC/TUI backpressure budget contract with read-only aggregator, contract, and checked-in evidence
child_artifact_map.title: Unify provider RPC TUI backpressure evidence into one budget contract

child_artifact_map.claim_boundary_text: Operator explanations summarize blockers and next safe actions but do not make stale, missing, or degraded evidence green.
child_artifact_map.close_reason: Completed operator explanation layer for stale evidence, missing artifacts, RCH failures, dirty worktree conflicts, and Agent Mail degradation with claim-integrity fixtures
child_artifact_map.title: Add operator explainability for stale evidence and validation blockers

checklist.requirement: Every sixth-wave child bead maps to pushed commits, source paths, validation commands, and claim-boundary text.
RCH worker workspace-shadow failures are classified before cargo results are trusted.
Agent Mail semantic corruption surfaces Beads soft-lock fallback without blocking work.
Cargo and script validation proofs record command, runner, coverage, result, and blocker authority.
Swarm temp artifacts are inventoried with explicit no-delete policy boundaries.
Stale in-progress bead reporting emits review checklists instead of automatic reopen actions.
No-mock degraded-coordination E2E evidence covers Beads soft locks, degraded validation, and no-delete output.
Doctor swarm resource preflight consumes cgroup, NUMA, local build pressure, and RCH queue posture with explanations.
Provider, RPC, and TUI pressure evidence is normalized into one read-only budget contract.
Validation blockers map to stable categories, explanations, affected artifacts, and next safe actions.

evidence.boundary: Beads issue state and close reasons remain the work ledger.
Agent Mail coordinates ownership but does not replace Beads, git, source inspection, or validation evidence.
The sixth-wave closeout gate summarizes existing evidence and does not mutate runtime sources.
Heavy Cargo validation evidence must prove RCH execution.
Staged UBS remains mandatory before the closeout commit.
Beads ledger reconciliation remains mandatory before closeout.
Sixth-wave validation hardening closeout evidence is advisory and does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.
The gate must not mutate Agent Mail storage, RCH worker state, installed extensions, user config, git refs, or temp artifacts.
The closeout gate summarizes child evidence and does not replace source tests, contracts, Beads, pushed commits, RCH, UBS, or CI.

checklist.requirement: Closeout source boundaries preserve Beads, Agent Mail, RCH, UBS, ledger, child-artifact, no-delete, and release-claim authorities.
All prerequisite child commits are pushed to origin/main and legacy origin/master before final closeout generation.
Required closeout quality gates passed for scripts, contracts, UBS, and Beads ledger.

claim_boundaries.allowed_claim: advisory sixth-wave validation hardening closeout evidence only

known_limitations: Sixth-wave validation hardening closeout evidence is advisory operator evidence only.
RCH, Agent Mail, Beads, Doctor, runpack, and claim-readiness proofs remain their own sources of truth.
This closeout does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.

source_boundary_checks.boundary: Beads issue state and close reasons remain the work ledger.
Agent Mail coordinates ownership but does not replace Beads, git, source inspection, or validation evidence.
The sixth-wave closeout gate summarizes existing evidence and does not mutate runtime sources.
Heavy Cargo validation evidence must prove RCH execution.
Staged UBS remains mandatory before the closeout commit.
Beads ledger reconciliation remains mandatory before closeout.
Sixth-wave validation hardening closeout evidence is advisory and does not authorize release, benchmark, capacity, performance, or strict drop-in claims.
The gate must not mutate Agent Mail storage, RCH worker state, installed extensions, user config, git refs, or temp artifacts.
The closeout gate summarizes child evidence and does not replace source tests, contracts, Beads, pushed commits, RCH, UBS, or CI.
